summary_one_line: Header fields (profile-class FOURCC at 0x0c, bytes at 0x2d/0x3d) must match magic values that route to a non-NULL Table CLUT allocation.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The ICC header must carry specific magic-valued fields: a profile-class FOURCC at offset 0x0c-0x0f that is one of spac/prtr/link (not mntr), plus the discriminator bytes 0x2d=0x01 and 0x3d=0x50, which together steer the profile-creation path into a CLUT stage invoked with a non-NULL Table argument so cmsStageAllocCLut16bitGranular takes the true branch at line 589.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner seeds carry exact magic values at the diff offsets: 0x2d=0x01 and 0x3d=0x50 in every winner, and the class FOURCC at 0x0c is spac/prtr/link; the W role hits lines 590-592 (the Table-copy loop) confirming the true branch is taken.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Every loser seed has 0x2d=0x00 and 0x3d=0x00 and the class FOURCC fixed at mntr, never matching the magic combination; the L role takes the false branch (L 589 T=0 F=20) and never reaches the Table-copy body.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which logs the runtime CMP operand (the expected magic FOURCC / header constant) and splices it directly into the matching input bytes; value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and only gets a CMP_MAP distance bucket, which cannot place the exact multi-byte magic constant, so it never flips these discrete equality gates.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the equality gate on Table being non-NULL at cmslut.c:589, whose true side is globally blocked.
Offset 0x3d holds 0x50 in all winners but 0x00 in all losers, a fully-discriminating DIFFER offset.
Offset 0x2d holds 0x01 in all winners but 0x00 in all losers, another fully-discriminating DIFFER offset.
The profile-class FOURCC at 0x0c differs: winners use spac/prtr/link-class bytes while losers are uniformly mntr.
Winner seeds carry the spac/prtr/link class signatures in their header bytes.
Loser seeds carry the mntr class signature and 0x00 at the discriminator offsets.
The winner role takes the true branch (Table-copy loop), the loser role does not.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 589  T=10 F=11  T=0 F=20  if (Table != NULL) {  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog includes the I2SRandReplace mutator while value_profile does not.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and relies only on CMP_MAP distance buckets.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2202 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 006035891e3a6630` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -, ParentInfo-only) at depth 16 of the 17-level ancestor chain; tool reports '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 16', the I2S-floor signal exclusive to cmplog/vpc finds.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating line 589's true branch behind an exact multi-byte header magic, where value_profile resolves the branch as often as value_profile_cmplog would refute the I2S-specific attribution.

weakest_evidence_point: The semantic link from the magic bytes at 0x2d/0x3d and the class FOURCC to a non-NULL Table argument is inferred from the deep call chain rather than directly traced, so the exact field that selects the Table-supplying path is not pinned down.
